title: Solid Ruby Red Round Paper Dinner Plates (22cm) 16 Count - Sturdy & Elegant for Parties and Events
features: SOLID ROUND DINNER PLATES: Impress your guests with our elegant and sturdy solid ruby red round paper dinner plates, perfect for any party or event.
RUBY RED COLOR: Add a touch of sophistication to your table setting with our beautifully designed ruby red-colored plates, ideal for weddings, baby showers, birthdays, and more.
PREMIUM PAPER CONSTRUCTION: Our 22cm dinner plates are made from high-quality paper that's both durable and eco-friendly, ensuring a hassle-free cleanup after your event.
16 COUNT PACK: Each pack contains 16 solid ruby red round paper dinner plates, allowing you to conveniently cater to a small gathering or easily combine multiple packs for larger events.
ELEVATE YOUR CELEBRATION: Opt for these stylish and practical solid ruby red round paper dinner plates to stand out at your next gathering and make entertaining a breeze.
